reviews.review_description:
Don't play this in 1st person.  

Remember when you were a kid and you flew your X-Wing (fighter jet whatever) around the bedroom and your eyes were the camera? That's this. 

Play it like that, in 3rd person, and you will have a blast.
Cannot get passed level 3…… what am I doing wrong? It’s a great game but why so difficult to beat??
Stuck on mission four , i'm about to pull my hair out of my head.

This game is a somewhat fun starter VR game, but its gameplay is not super engaging and you might find yourself getting a bit bored fairly quickly. Certainly doesn't help that there aren't enough people playing so the multiplayer feature may as well not exist.
One of my all time favorite and go to space shooter! Good graphics, controls and has plenty of replayability. We need more games like this. Kudos to devs for all the effort put into the game. 👍 👍 👍
Honestly had a blast playing this game! Game play, graphics, sounds, just loved it.. I have to play in 3rd person view because I am very motion sick flying around in 1st person view

everything's better on sale!!

https://www.oculus.com/ appreferrals/QDaBeat/4531913893511480/?utm_source=4
My first review ever, and I’m doing it just to add this request. Fun game but it would be tons better if I could play dogfight with a friend, alone.
Seems like this game is so poorly designed there is no one playing it online ever.  I feel like 1 star is too much for this game

reviews.review_title: Horrible to play in first person
reviews.review_description:
I tried to play it in the first person cockpit view using the control sticks but it’s unplayable to me. It doesn’t make me sick although if you’re prone to that it probably will.
It’s just way too twitchy to be able to play. Hitting anything with guns is impossible, hand aimed rockets are the only viable option. There’s no option to reduce sensitivity so your only option is is insane speed.
On top of that, the HUD markers to indicate off screen enemies don’t work at all. They turn off before the ship is on screen so locating ships is impossible. 
I love flying games but this is the first game to make me work out how to use the refund policy. A real shame cos a good space shooter is very much lacking :(

developer_response.body: Hi, Please try the new precision aiming option. It enables you to use the grip button to adjust your blaster direction. Give it a go!

reviews.review_description:
Very nice game but oculus doesnot want quest1 be able to install it.
It does good work on my quest 1 at moment like VVR2 but oculus has some bad ideas that want to kill the quest1 users in this month.
I can install It at moment but what will happen in next month who konws? Here is not every body able to buy the quest2 that I was grateful to Oculus but Im very hate it right now.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this game did never mention it was supporting the Quest 1. Where did you get that info? So if you still want to run it on Quest 1(with no support), please join us on our discord channel to see what we can do for you. 
Discord: 
https://discord.gg/pCgr6rgraY

reviews.review_description: Anshar 2 Hyperdrive is an addicting game with the right amount of intensity and excitement from one level to the next definitely worth it.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Now we are blushing!

reviews.review_description: Love the game, great controls and story. Sadly the MP never has anyone to play with. Shame, it's a great game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you! Please join our discord to setup MP events!
Discord: 
https://discord.gg/pCgr6rgraY

reviews.review_description:
The main thing that worried me about this game were the controls. I usually struggle with VR flying Sims, but the controls here are absolutely perfect.

No motion sickness at all, just superb graphics and gameplay!

developer_response.body: AWESOME ! Best compliment ever! Thank you!

reviews.review_title: Nope! It's not like Star Fox & Star Lynx
reviews.review_description:
In fact, it was not what I had expected.
Refund! Played less than 1 Hour.

https://tinyurl.com/4nezmhun

(Had to make it a tinyurl for it to send sorry)

I recommend playing the game while sitting down to get that immersive experience feeling. Runs smooth and never crashes!

I have been looking forward to buying this game when it released, and it did not disappoint. The game mechanics are absolutely dope and, for me, doesn’t cause motion sickness. The ability to switch between first and third pov is incredible and both have different unique mechanics. Having multiplayer and the campaign is a plus. I love the ability to fight other players.

Here’s my only problem. The campaign mode is a bit boring bc of all the talking and the graphics aren’t the absolute best… And in multiplayer mode there isn’t a choice of weapons, you just get the same guns. 

But other than that, it thought it was truly incredible. The missions on campaign mode aren’t those easy, one-play levels. It took me about 5-6 tries just to beat the first level. Multiplayer mode is also really cool bc you can talk to others through the app. Definitely one of my favorite flyer games out there. The developer did a great job 👏👍

developer_response.body: Thank you! Stay tuned for multiplayer updates, we are actively working on them!

reviews.review_description:
I tried a couple of times but never any games available and starting a game it takes hours and still nobody joins…
I live in Europe and played in morning day and evening…
This really dissapoints for me..
I tried finding contact info but this was the only way I could reach out.

Beside this the game is awesome, if the online gameplay could be fixed it would be a 5star rating, I would love to change it!!!

developer_response.body:
Ohhh that is a shame. Please join our discord channel and setup some event with us!
https://discord.gg/pCgr6rgraY
Anshar 2 community is still relatively small but we have hardcore players in Europe (the devs too) that would love to setup some time and play a few round. No more waiting in the lobby ;)

reviews.review_title: Amazing graphics on a wireless headset!!
reviews.review_description:
Game is fantastic, great tight controls, very difficult and demanding game on hard mode. Multiple is very good where it stands, but it would be awesome to see a couple more players in the game instead of 6. 8 would be more like it. Online  Co op and team deathmatch would also be amazing. 

Either way, game is amazing regardless. Buy it, NOW.

developer_response.body: Thank you! The response from the community was so overwhelmingly positive that we are actively preparing more content over the next updates. Please stay tuned. We will make a dev post as soon as we have a clear plan for you ;)
